context_notes: Phase 2 is content-and-gate-complete. Plans 01-06 shipped + Plan 07 Task 1 (automated audits) ran clean. On 2026-05-23 the executor paused at Task 2 checkpoint awaiting real-device tests. On 2026-05-24 the user came back, ran a LOCAL PREVIEW REVIEW (`npm run preview --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4321`), visually confirmed the 4 LOCKED pages render OK in their browser, and then flagged 'vamos a seguir haciendo unos ajustes' without listing what. They invoked /gsd-pause-work to end the day. Resume order: ASK FOR AJUSTES LIST → apply ajustes (each as a discrete commit) → resume Task 2 visual-only path → Task 3 (Sofía) → 02-07-SUMMARY.md → Phase 2 close (code-review → regression → verifier → ROADMAP/STATE/PROJECT updates). Preview server was cleanly killed (SIGTERM, exit 143); no background processes running. Working tree clean before this WIP commit.
